req.title: Export employee directory — variant 4
req.statement: An hr-admin shall export the employee directory as CSV with PII redacted for employees who opted out of public directory. Additionally, the operation must be rate-limited per user.

tests.name: naive_case

doc._raw_response:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for HR Admin Employee Directory CSV Export Feature.

Requirements:
- HR admin can export employee directory as CSV
- PII is redacted for employees who opted out of public directory
- Export operation is rate-limited per user
"""

import csv
import io
import time
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from http import HTTPStatus
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch

import pytest


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures & helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def opted_in_employee():
    return {
        "id": "emp-001",
        "name": "Alice Johnson",
        "email": "alice.johnson@company.com",
        "phone": "+1-555-0101",
        "department": "Engineering",
        "title": "Senior Engineer",
        "location": "New York",
        "opted_out": False,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def opted_out_employee():
    return {
        "id": "emp-002",
        "name": "Bob Smith",
        "email": "bob.smith@company.com",
        "phone": "+1-555-0202",
        "department": "Finance",
        "title": "Financial Analyst",
        "location": "Chicago",
        "opted_out": True,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def another_opted_out_employee():
    return {
        "id": "emp-003",
        "name": "Carol White",
        "email": "carol.white@company.com",
        "phone": "+1-555-0303",
        "department": "HR",
        "title": "HR Manager",
        "location": "Austin",
        "opted_out": True,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def employee_repository(opted_in_employee, opted_out_employee, another_opted_out_employee):
    """In-memory employee repository stub."""
    repo = MagicMock()
    repo.get_all.return_value = [
        opted_in_employee,
        opted_out_employee,
        another_opted_out_employee,
    ]
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def rate_limiter():
    """Simple in-memory rate limiter stub."""
    limiter = MagicMock()
